title: B1 Listening Part 1 - Test 35
instructions: For each question, listen to the recording and choose the correct answer: A, B or C.

items.context: You hear two friends talking about lost umbrella.
items.audio_script: Girl: Have you found your umbrella? You looked worried earlier. || Boy: Not at first. I searched the music classroom because I remembered using it there, then checked the local shop, but nobody had seen it. || Girl: So where did it turn up? || Boy: My café owner has just messaged me. [1]It is under a table in the café[/1]. I must have left it there. I will collect it at lunch because I need it for walking home in the rain. || Girl: Great. You can stop searching now and concentrate on the day.
items.question: Where is the umbrella?

options.B: Under a table in the café

items.explanation: The speaker says the umbrella is under a table in the café.

items.context: You hear two friends talking about buying a birthday present.
items.audio_script: Girl: Did you buy a birthday present for my dad? You said you were going into town after school. || Boy: Yes, but choosing took a while. I first considered a cap, because that seemed a safe choice. || Girl: What about a box of chocolates? That might have been useful. || Boy: I looked at that, but it did not seem right. In the end, [2]I bought some cycling gloves because his old pair have worn out[/2]. || Girl: That sounds thoughtful. I am sure it will be appreciated. || Boy: I hope so. I will wrap it this evening before tomorrow's party.
items.question: What did the speaker buy?
items.explanation: The speaker says they bought some cycling gloves because his old pair have worn out.

items.context: You hear two people talking about a part-time job at the library.
items.audio_script: Woman: What job are you doing at the library this afternoon? I thought you were going to repair computers. || Man: That was yesterday's plan, but somebody finished it before lunch. || Woman: So will you put up posters instead? || Man: No, the manager says that is not needed today. [3]I have to return books to the correct shelves because there is a large pile at the desk[/3]. || Woman: That sounds manageable, although you may be busy. || Man: Yes, I want to finish before five because I promised to meet my friends afterwards nearby.
items.question: What job will the speaker do?

options.A: Return books to the correct shelves

items.explanation: The speaker says they have to return books to the correct shelves because there is a large pile at the desk.

items.context: You hear two students talking about what to take on the beach visit.
items.audio_script: Girl: Are you ready for the beach visit tomorrow? I was checking what we have to bring, because I do not want to forget anything. || Boy: I was going to pack a towel. Do we need that? || Girl: No, it is not on the list. || Boy: Perhaps I should take a book instead. || Girl: You can, but [4]everyone must bring some sun cream because the weather will be bright all afternoon[/4]. || Boy: Thanks for reminding me. I will put it in my bag tonight, so I am ready when we leave.
items.question: What must the student take?
items.explanation: The speaker says everyone must bring some sun cream because the weather will be bright all afternoon.

items.context: You hear two friends making plans.
items.audio_script: Woman: Are we still planning to go to the market on Sunday? I had already arranged everything for it. || Man: I am afraid not. The market is cancelled and the café is too crowded, so that plan will not work now. || Woman: We could meet at a café instead. Would that be easier? || Man: I thought about that, but I have a better idea. [5]Let us visit the museum on Sunday instead[/5]. || Woman: Fine with me. Where shall we meet? || Man: Meet me by the bus stop at four, and bring your student card in case they ask for it.
items.question: What will they do?
items.explanation: The speaker suggests that they visit the museum on Sunday instead.

items.context: You hear two students talking about chess club.
items.audio_script: Girl: Do you know where chess club is being held today? I was going to the canteen, where we usually meet. || Boy: Do not go there. The canteen is being cleaned and the sports hall is being used for badminton, so the organiser changed the room. || Girl: I wondered whether it might be in the sports hall. || Boy: No, that is not right either. [6]We need to meet in the library this afternoon[/6]. || Girl: Thanks for telling me. I would have waited in the wrong place. || Boy: I will message the others too, so nobody misses the beginning.
items.question: Where will chess club be held?
items.explanation: The speaker says they need to meet in the library.

items.context: You hear two friends talking about a picnic.
items.audio_script: Girl: Are we still having the picnic tomorrow? I heard the weather might not be as good as we expected. || Boy: Yesterday it said it would be sunny, although someone else warned me it could be windy. || Girl: What does the latest forecast say? || Boy: Unfortunately, [7]the latest forecast says heavy rain will arrive at lunchtime[/7], so we may have to eat indoors instead. || Girl: That is a shame, but at least we can decide before everyone leaves home. || Boy: Exactly. I will message the group this evening.
items.question: What will the weather be like for the picnic?
items.explanation: The latest forecast says heavy rain will arrive at lunchtime.
